signals.headline: Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Predictions | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Predictions | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's X predictions page shows 1346-1347 active markets, with the top one being "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by...?" at 97% odds for December 31, reflecting strong trader consensus on prolonged conflict amid high volume across X-related bets.[1]
